'''Dona Telemark''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived during the first [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Dona sheltered former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ferus Olin]] when he was on the run from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. She escaped during an attack from the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[D'harhan]].

In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], Telamark was arrested along with [[Roan Lands]] by the Empire on charges of conspiracy against the government of [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]] and plotting to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] the Bellassan Imperial [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]]. The two prisoners were held aboard the ''[[True Justice]]'' in an effort to coerce Olin to work for the Empire. Scheduled for a speedy trial by Judge [[Bellican]], [[Lawyer/Legends|Attorney]] [[Oryon|Tomay Alcorn]], and law clerk [[Sam Weller]], the duo was unexpectedly set free when [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]], Oryon, and [[Trever Flume]], impersonating the Imperial judicial team, hijacked the retrofitted [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]].
